Measuring
Proposed addition. Operational KPIs that would measure how the $59.1M roads budget is executed in the field. None are currently published by the County.

Road Service Operations

Track execution of the published clustering and prioritization policy. (Proposed; not implemented.)

Look up your property

Proposed: enter a parcel number or address to see road condition, open tickets, treatment history, and budget for the segment in front of your property.
